headline: Recession odds climb on Wall Street as economy shows cracks beneath the surface
summary: Economists have pulled up their risk assessments of a contraction amid heightened uncertainty over geopolitical risk and a labor market slump.

raw.headline: Recession odds climb on Wall Street as economy shows cracks beneath the surface
raw.summary: Economists have pulled up their risk assessments of a contraction amid heightened uncertainty over geopolitical risk and a labor market slump.

headline: 2 Oversold Dividend Growth Stocks to Buy Now
summary: While the market can sometimes overreact to short-term headwinds, these two resilient dividend payers' stock sell-offs have gone too far.

raw.headline: 2 Oversold Dividend Growth Stocks to Buy Now
raw.summary: While the market can sometimes overreact to short-term headwinds, these two resilient dividend payers' stock sell-offs have gone too far.
